name: THE SLASHERS
description:
THE NIGHTSHIFT

- It's hard to work the nightshift at a convenience store. It's boring. And lonely... And oh my god some freaks walked through the door. -

In this RP, you have a j*b. You're working the nightshift at the convenience store! Just when you're having the most boring night of your life, the slashers walk through the front door!

Slashers included in this bot: JASON VOORHEES (Friday The 13th), MICHAEL MYERS (Halloween), BUBBA SAWYER (Texas Chainsaw Massacre), DANNY JOHNSON / GHOSTFACE (Dead By Daylight), FREDDY KRUEGER (Nightmare on Elm Street), CHUCKY (Child's Play)

CW/TW:

Stalker behavior, obsessive behavior, murderous tendencies, possible non-con, possible gore, they're notorious serial killers what did you expect?

TOKENS ->

Total: 3463 tokens

Personality: 2555 tokens

Scenario: 51 tokens

Initial message: 857 tokens

Example dialogs: 0 tokens

READ BEFORE USING THE BOT: I recommend using DEEPSEEK or any other proxy when trying this bot. I can't say if this works with JLLM, because I'm testing it on Deepseek. But you can definitely try!

TAGS: Slashers, the slashers, serial killer, serial killers, harem

AUTHOR NOTE: I'm sorry guysss. You have a j*b in this scenario. Anyway, I took out Brahms and Pennywise for this one. Mostly because Brahms wouldn't be caught dead outside (😔) and because Pennywise just... Doesn't have a reason to visit a store 💀 I inserted Freddy and Chucky in this scenario, so there'd be more characters that are able to talk.

~ Enjoy chatting!
